<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 10:01:42 PT

No tripwire violations detected across 4 changed files.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- Universal tripwires (subprocess, gateway ABC, error handling, Path.home, os.chdir, time module, __init__ I/O, test coverage, gh pr diff limits, session ID env vars)
- Commands tripwires (tool restrictions, CLAUDE_SESSION_ID usage)
- CLI tripwires (function signatures, error handling, exec patterns, dependency injection)
- Testing tripwires (fake patterns, test assertions, FakeGitHubIssues usage)

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches (Mechanical)
✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - None found in diff
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` in production code - None found in diff (only in real gateway implementations, which is allowed)
✅ `monkeypatch\.setattr.*Path\.home|monkeypatch.*subprocess\.run` - None found in diff
✅ `monkeypatch\.chdir\(\)` - None found in diff

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches (LLM-derived)
✅ Bare subprocess calls - None found (no subprocess usage in this PR)
✅ Default parameter values - None found (all use keyword-only params with `*`)
✅ Gateway ABC additions - N/A (no gateway changes)
✅ Time module imports - None found
✅ os.chdir() calls - None found
✅ Test coverage - All new functions have comprehensive tests
✅ FakeGitHubIssues patterns - Correct usage in tests (passed to build_workspace_test_context)
✅ Tool restrictions in commands - Appropriate tools listed (Bash, Task, Skill, AskUserQuestion, EnterPlanMode)
✅ Dependency injection - Correct pattern: `_mark_node_planning` accepts injected `issues` gateway parameter
✅ Click command structure - Proper keyword-only params with `*` separator

### Violations Summary
No violations found.

### Files Reviewed
- `.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md`: 0 violations (delegation to inner command)
- `.claude/commands/erk/system/objective-plan-node.md`: 0 violations (new command with proper tool restrictions)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py`: 0 violations (proper gateway injection, keyword-only params, dignified-python patterns)
- `tests/commands/objective/test_plan.py`: 0 violations (correct fake patterns, proper assertions, FakeGitHubIssues usage)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 10:01:42 PT**: No violations detected. Reviewed 4 files: new objective-plan-node command follows tool restriction guidelines, _mark_node_planning() follows dignified-python patterns (keyword-only params, gateway injection), tests use proper FakeGitHubIssues patterns with build_workspace_test_context.
- **2026-02-25 06:46:49 PT**: No violations detected. Reviewed 4 files: new objective-plan-node command follows tool restriction guidelines, _mark_node_planning() follows dignified-python patterns (keyword-only params, gateway injection), tests use proper FakeGitHubIssues patterns with build_workspace_test_context.
